gui.hudmod.none_selected.desc: Please hover over an option to see short summary and preview!
gui.hudmod.bedrock_coords.desc: Displays a coordinate counter much like bedrock editions
gui.hudmod.bedrock_days.desc: Displays a days played counter like bedrock editions
gui.hudmod.bedrock_time.desc: Displays a time of day counter in the style of a bedrock edition stat like the other ones. This is not in actual bedrock!
gui.hudmod.bedrock_fps.desc: Displays an fps counter in the style of a bedrock edition stat like the other ones. This is not in actual bedrock!
gui.hudmod.compass.desc: Displays a compass at the top of your screen (Displays under Jade)
gui.hudmod.compass_smooth.desc:
Smoothes out the motion of the compass with linear interpolation.

§eWarning it is experimental and is unusable at low framerates!

§aRecomended average framerate: 60 ish
